# Handwritten Notes Generator

An advanced AI-powered web application that transforms digital text and source code into realistic, natural-looking handwriting.

## Key Features
- **Theory Mode**: Convert regular notes into cursive or print handwriting.
- **Coding Mode**: Specialized rendering for programming assignments with support for symbols.
- **Font Generator**: Create installable .TTF and .WOFF fonts directly from your own handwriting samples.
- **Vectorization**: High-quality contour tracing for smoother, sharper handwriting extraction.
- **Session Isolation**: Dedicated workspaces for notes and font projects.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Vite, TypeScript.
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python), OpenCV, FontTools.
- **Styling**: Vanilla CSS with a focus on premium aesthetics and dark mode.

## Links
- [Dashboard](https://handwritten-notes.app/)
- [Font Generator](https://handwritten-notes.app/font-generator)
- [How it Works](https://handwritten-notes.app/how-to)
